test_cases.name: [SynchronizedBeforeSuite]
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a private cluster [OPTIONAL] Creates a public management cluster in a custom vnet
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a highly available cluster [REQUIRED] With 3 control-plane nodes and 2 Linux and 2 Windows worker nodes
[It] Workload cluster creation when Creating a highly available cluster with Azure CNI v1 [REQUIRED] can create 3 control-plane nodes and 2 Linux worker nodes [Azure CNI v1]
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a Flatcar sysext cluster [OPTIONAL] With Flatcar control-plane and worker nodes
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a cluster with spot vms [OPTIONAL] With spot vm machine deployments
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a ipv6 control-plane cluster [REQUIRED] With ipv6 worker node
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a VMSS cluster [REQUIRED] with a single control plane node and an AzureMachinePool with 2 Linux nodes
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a GPU-enabled cluster [OPTIONAL] with a single control plane node and 1 node
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a cluster with VMSS flex machinepools [OPTIONAL] with 1 control plane node and 1 machinepool
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating an AKS cluster for control plane tests [Managed Kubernetes] with a single control plane node and 1 node
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating an AKS cluster for node pool tests [Managed Kubernetes] with a single control plane node and 1 node
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating an AKS cluster using ClusterClass [Managed Kubernetes] with a single control plane node and 1 node
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating an AKS cluster with the ASO API [Managed Kubernetes] with a single control plane node and 1 node
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a dual-stack cluster [OPTIONAL] With dual-stack worker node
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating clusters using clusterclass [OPTIONAL] with a single control plane node and one linux worker node
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating RKE2 clusters using clusterclass [OPTIONAL] with 3 control plane node and one linux worker node
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating clusters on public MEC [OPTIONAL] with 1 control plane nodes and 1 worker node

[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a self-managed VM based cluster using API Server ILB feature gate using default template [OPTIONAL][API-Server-ILB] with three controlplane node and three worker nodes

[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a self-managed VM based cluster using API Server ILB feature gate and fully spec-ed out APIServer ILB template [OPTIONAL][API-Server-ILB] with three controlplane node and three worker nodes
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a highly-available cluster with Azure Linux 3 [OPTIONAL] with three controlplane node and two worker nodes
[It] Workload cluster creation Testing autoscaling from zero with Cluster Autoscaler [REQUIRED] Scales MachineDeployment from 0 to 1+ when workload is scheduled
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a cluster and deploying KubeRay [OPTIONAL] Creates a RayCluster and verifies it becomes ready
[It] Workload cluster creation Creating a cluster and deploying KubeRay [OPTIONAL] Creates a RayJob and verifies it completes successfully
[It] Conformance Tests conformance-tests
[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests Running the quick-start spec Should create a workload cluster
[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests Running the MachineDeployment rollout spec Should successfully upgrade Machines upon changes in relevant MachineDeployment fields
[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests Running the self-hosted spec Should pivot the bootstrap cluster to a self-hosted cluster
[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests Should successfully remediate unhealthy worker machines with MachineHealthCheck Should replace unhealthy machines
[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests Should successfully exercise machine pools Should successfully create a cluster with machine pool machines

[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests Should successfully scale out and scale in a MachineDeployment Should successfully scale a MachineDeployment up and down upon changes to the MachineDeployment replica count

[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests API Version Upgrade upgrade from an old version of v1beta1 to current, and scale workload clusters created in the old version Should create a management cluster and then upgrade all the providers

[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests API Version Upgrade upgrade from the latest version of v1beta1 to current, and scale workload clusters created in the old version Should create a management cluster and then upgrade all the providers

[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests API Version Upgrade upgrade from an old version of v1beta1 to current, and scale AKS workload clusters created in the old version Should create a management cluster and then upgrade all the providers

[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests API Version Upgrade upgrade from the latest version of v1beta1 to current, and scale AKS workload clusters created in the old version Should create a management cluster and then upgrade all the providers
[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests Running the workload cluster upgrade spec [K8s-Upgrade] Should create and upgrade a workload cluster and eventually run kubetest
[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests Running KCP upgrade in a HA cluster [K8s-Upgrade] Should create and upgrade a workload cluster and eventually run kubetest
[It] Running the Cluster API E2E tests Running KCP upgrade in a HA cluster using scale in rollout [K8s-Upgrade] Should create and upgrade a workload cluster and eventually run kubetest
[SynchronizedAfterSuite]
